mapper.select: SELECT id, title, number, difficulty, site, link, grade, solve_count AS solveCount, last_solved_date AS lastSolvedDate FROM problems WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problems (title, number, difficulty, site, link, grade, solve_count, last_solved_date, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{number}, #{difficulty}, #{site}, #{link}, #{grade}, #{solveCount}, #{lastSolvedDate}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM problems WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT category_name FROM problem_categories WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
